    <string name="ecomm_and_target_plans_item_footer_new">"Upfront payment of $45 for 3-month plan (equiv. to $15/mo.) req'd. New customer offer first 3 months only; then full-price plan options available. Taxes & fees extra. Customers who use over 35GB a month may notice reduced data speeds for the rest of their monthly cycle in certain locations when our network is busy. Includes up to 10GB hotspot. Videos stream at ~480p. See terms."</string>

You need a payment method on your account to have a Mint Family. To remove, you first need to delete your family. This payment method was declined by your financial institution and cannot be used. Please review the information and try again. Request code cannot be Integer.MIN_VALUE https://assets.mintmobile.com/data/devices_esim.json Go to Network & Internet in your device Settings Tap on Add Mobile Network (the + icon) Select Download a SIM instead" "

<string name="fcc_sim_swap_fragment_text">"Number Lock helps prevent unauthorized users from hijacking your SIM, your number and ultimately your account. Once it's on, turning it off requires a one-time password be sent to your phone number or email address (that's been on your account for at least 30 days) to confirm it's you."</string>
    <string name="fcc_sim_swap_fragment_title">Number Lock</string>
    <string name="fcm_fallback_notification_channel_label">Miscellaneous</string>
    <string name="firebase_database_url">https://mint-sim-app.firebaseio.com</string>
    <string name="forgot_password_validation_footer">"• This code expires in 30 mins.
• For Kid’s Plans, codes are sent to the parent’s email.
• Didn’t receive a code? Call Care at (800) 683–7392"</string>
